signature_citation: Curated consensus AD brain transcriptomic signature (up = reactive glia / microglial activation / complement, down = synaptic / neuronal), after Zhang et al. 2013 (Cell 153:707; TYROBP causal network), Mathys et al. 2019 (Nature 570:332; single-cell AD), and Mostafavi et al. 2018 (Nat Neurosci 21:811). APPROXIMATION — not a single-study DE table.
